data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — AC2 verified: bash tests/scripts/test-write-reviewer-findings.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL returns success (FAIL found). AC1 (run-all exit 0) contradicts the RED requirement — Script Tests suite fails because the 6 new RED tests fail, which is the intended state.
